name: detectors: fetch-timeout.sh exits 1 when `fetch(url)` is called without {signal: AbortSignal.timeout(...)} option (g-node-003)
command: mkdir -p src && printf "await fetch(\"https://api.example.com\");\n" > src/f.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/fetch-timeout.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.js"
